channel.title: Faatiha Aayat
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed for Faatiha Aayat

item.title: A powerful message from Tufail Ahmed Tufa, Secretary of Science & Technology, RU...
item.description: A powerful message from Tufail Ahmed Tufa, Secretary of Science & Technology, RUCSU, highlighting the collaboration behind Zero Olympiad and its growing impact across Rajshahi. With RUCSU’s support, this initiative is reaching students from schools, colleges, universities, and madrasas — inviting every curious mind to step forward and compete. YOUReach has already been actively promoting Zero Olympiad across numerous institutions, and the response has been inspiring. With this momentum, we’re hopeful to see even more participants joining from the University of Rajshahi and beyond. This is more than just an Olympiad—it’s a movement to empower young thinkers, innovators, and future leaders. Be part of it. 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗡𝗼𝘄 www.zeroolympiad.com/registration 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲 May 06, 2026 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗙𝗲𝗲 300 BDT Use Code 𝗬𝗥𝗭𝟮𝟲 to confirm your registration with 25% discount! #ZeroOlympiad #RUCSU #YOUReach #RajshahiStudents #YouthEmpowerment
